name: Xun Yun (Changqian)
page_title: Xun Yun (Changqian) 荀惲 (長倩) [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
ranks: General of the Interior of Tiger Might.
historical_notes:
Xun Yun, styled Changqing, was the eldest son of Xun Yu. He inherited his father’s feif and married to the Princess of Anyang, Cao Cao’s daughter. He was a close friend of Cao Zhi, which Cao Pi resented. He died young. (1)

1: A Biographical Dictionary of the Later Han to the Three Kingdoms, de Crespigny, Rafe

full_text:
Xun Yun (Changqian) 荀惲 (長倩)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Yun (荀惲), styledChangqian (長倩), was born in Yingchuan. Friend of Cao Zhi. Didn’t get on with Xiahou Shang, Cao Pi resented it. Xun Yun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Xun Yun, styled Changqing, was the eldest son of Xun Yu. He inherited his father’s feif and married to the Princess of Anyang, Cao Cao’s daughter. He was a close friend of Cao Zhi, which Cao Pi resented. He died young. (1)
